content.speakerText: I have a package for IT. Can you deliver it to their floor?
content.speakerTextCn: 我有个给IT部的包裹，能送到他们楼层吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure, I'll take it up to the 5th floor for you.
I can drop it at the IT reception — would that work?
I'm heading there now; I'll leave it on their desk.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了派送请求
语言准确性：使用了正确介词和动词（take up, drop off, leave on）
表达自然度：语调自然，符合职场日常对话节奏

content.scenarioHint: 你刚收到一个快递，但正在开会，想请前台帮忙送到你的办公桌
content.speakerText: Could you please bring this package to my desk? I'm in a meeting right now.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能把这份快递送到我桌上吗？我现在在开会。
expectedAnswers: Of course! I'll drop it off right away.
Sure, I'll take it to your desk—just let me know your extension.
I can do that, but could you confirm your room number?
Absolutely! I'll leave it on your desk and send you a quick text.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确请求将快递送到指定位置
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了恰当的礼貌表达（如 could you, please）
表达自然度：符合职场日常口语习惯，不生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：包含 package/desk/meeting 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你有一个紧急文件需要立刻送到隔壁部门，但自己走不开，想请前台协助派送
content.speakerText: I need this document delivered to Sales ASAP—could you handle it for me?
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要这份文件立刻送到销售部，你能帮我处理一下吗？
expectedAnswers: No problem—I'll take it over personally.
I can send it via internal courier, but I'll need the recipient's name.
I’ll leave it at the Sales reception—do you want me to notify them?
On my way! Should I hand it to someone specific?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达紧急需求和目标部门
语言准确性：正确使用 ASAP, could you, handle it 等实用表达
表达自然度：语气礼貌且符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：包含 document/Sales/ASAP/delivered 等核心词汇
